page: Microsoft Azure EC96iads_v5 is an isolated virtual machine instance belonging to the ECIADSv5 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs built on the x86_64 AMD processor architecture. The instance is equipped with 672.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. Local storage is bundled, providing 3686 GB of local disk capacity, and the instance is capable of utilizing Premium Storage.

This instance is designed as an isolated hardware resource, which limits multi-tenant interference but restricts deployment to a single large-scale size within its family. It does not include integrated graphics processing units or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the high density of both memory and local storage on a dedicated AMD platform provides a consolidated resource footprint, reducing the need for multiple smaller instances and simplifying cluster management for large workloads.

Given the combination of 96 dedicated vCPUs, 672.0 GB of RAM, and 3686 GB of local storage, the EC96iads_v5 is configured for memory-intensive and storage-heavy enterprise applications. Appropriate workloads include large relational databases, in-memory analytics, enterprise resource planning systems, and data warehousing operations that require high-capacity local scratch space and substantial memory overhead.
description: Microsoft Azure EC96iads_v5 is an isolated virtual machine from the ECIADSv5 family, powered by an x86_64 AMD processor and running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 672.0 GB of system memory, establishing a high memory-to-core ratio of 7.0 GB per vCPU. The instance includes 3686 GB of local storage and supports Premium Storage configurations. It does not feature integrated GPUs or complimentary public IPv4 addresses. From a qualitative standpoint, its isolated architecture and high resource density offer a consolidated footprint for demanding enterprise deployments. This hardware profile is suited for memory-intensive databases, in-memory data analytics, large-scale enterprise resource planning systems, and data warehousing workloads requiring substantial local storage capacity and dedicated compute resources.

tagline: An isolated x86_64 platform featuring ninety-six dedicated cores, high memory density, and substantial local storage for enterprise database workloads.
